nodes.name: Heleia
nodes.summary: Heleia（Heleia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Javan heleia、Grey-hooded heleia、Pygmy heleia等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Timor heleia
nodes.summary: Timor heleia（Heleia muelleri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Timor heleia。

nodes.name: Timor heleia
nodes.summary: The Timor heleia (Heleia muelleri), also known as the spot-breasted white-eye or spot-breasted heleia, is a species of bird in the white-eye family Zosteropidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
